description_long: This rifle object appears heavily corroded and encrusted, as if it has been exposed to extreme weather or fire. The surface is irregular, with rough, lumpy textures and a mottled coloration of dark browns, blacks, and some reddish-orange patches, suggesting rust or burnt residue. The main body is blocky and thick, with a prominent barrel extending forward and several protrusions and nodules along the sides and bottom. The base is wide and fused to a circular platform, possibly for display or stabilization, and the overall silhouette is distorted, lacking the clean lines of a functional firearm. No clear stock, magazine, or sighting system is visible, and the details are obscured by the heavy surface damage. The object gives the impression of a rifle that has been rendered nonfunctional by severe environmental effects.
description: A heavily corroded, encrusted rifle with a rough, lumpy surface and dark, burnt coloration, fused to a circular base. The details are obscured by damage, giving it a distorted, weathered appearance.
description_view_0: The left side shows the thick, corroded barrel and main body, with rough protrusions and a wide, fused base.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the encrusted muzzle and irregular, blocky structure, with nodules obscuring the barrel opening.
description_view_2: The right side displays the elongated barrel and more surface texture, with the base and lower protrusions visible.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the rifle, with heavy corrosion and no visible stock or grip, emphasizing the fused base.
